title: helichrysum roseum
intro: Helichrysum roseum, also known as Everlasting or Immortelle, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Helichrysum roseum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum roseum, such as essential oils and tinctures, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
